basic_details.job_title: SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 100 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: State Bank of India (SBI), Central Recruitment & Promotion Department, Corporate Centre, Mumbai
basic_details.post_name: Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) – Specialist Cadre Officer, Regular Basis
basic_details.short_information: The State Bank of India (SBI) has officially announced the Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) - Specialist Cadre Officer Recruitment 2026 with 100 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at sbi.co.in. Candidates who meet the age criteria of 23 to 32 years (relaxations applicable as per category) and hold a Graduate degree in any discipline from a recognized University along with Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF can now submit their online applications from 13 May 2026 to 02 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

important_dates.interview_date: To be notified on SBI website

application_fee.details: Application fee and Intimation Charges are non-refundable and must be paid online through the payment gateway integrated with the application (Debit Card/Credit Card/Internet Banking). Transaction charges for online payment, if any, will be borne by the candidate. Application fee once paid will NOT be refunded on any account nor can it be adjusted for any other examination or selection in future. In case of multiple applications, fee paid for other registrations will stand forfeited.

age_limit.details: Age is calculated as on 30.04.2026. Cumulative age relaxation will not be available. Candidates seeking age relaxation are required to submit copies of necessary certificate(s) at the time of interview, if shortlisted. No change in category of any candidate is permitted after online registration; no correspondence/email/phone will be entertained in this regard.

qualification.experience: Minimum 2 years’ post-essential academic qualification experience in Trade Finance processing in Supervisory/Official role in any Scheduled Commercial Bank
qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill all eligibility conditions as on the cut-off date 30.04.2026. Teaching and training experience will not be counted for eligibility. The relevant experience certificate from the employer must specifically confirm that the candidate had experience in the related field as required. In cases where the degree/diploma certificate does not specify the field of specialization, a certificate from the concerned university/college specifically mentioning the specialization must be produced. | Educational Qualification and Experience

selection_process: Stage 1 Shortlisting (based on qualification, suitability, and experience as decided by the Bank’s shortlisting committee)
Stage 2 Interview (100 marks; qualifying marks decided by the Bank)
Merit List Prepared in descending order of interview scores; tie-breaking by age in descending order
Probation Period 6 months (as per Bank’s extant recruitment policy)
Grade Probation Period Pay Scale Perquisites

Middle Management Grade Scale – II (MMGS-II) 6 Months Rs. 64820-2340/1-67160-2680/10-93960 DA, HRA, CCA, Provident Fund, NPS (Contributory Pension Fund), Leave Fare Concession (LFC), Medical Facility, and other perquisites as per rules in force from time to time

Selection will be on the basis of Shortlisting and Interview. Merely fulfilling the minimum qualification and experience will not vest any right to candidate for being called for interview. The shortlisting committee constituted by the Bank will decide the shortlisting parameters. The decision of the Bank to call the candidates for interview shall be final. Interview will carry 100 marks; qualifying marks will be decided by the Bank. Merit list for selection will be prepared in descending order on the basis of scores obtained in interview only. In case of tie
candidates will be ranked according to their age in descending order. Intimation/Call Letter for Interview will be sent by email or uploaded on Bank’s website only - no hard copy will be sent.
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online only through the link available on SBI’s official website https://sbi.co.in/web/careers/current-openings. No other mode of application will be entertained. Hard copy of application and other documents need not be sent to this office. The process of registration is completed only when fee is deposited with the Bank through online mode on or before the last date. Candidates are advised to apply online well before the closing date and not to wait till the last date to avoid any technical issues.

Candidates must upload all required documents at the time of online application; failure to upload documents will result in candidature not being considered for shortlisting/interview. After expiry of the window for online application, no change/correction/modification will be allowed under any circumstances.
Documents to be Uploaded at the Time of Online Application:
Mandatory Certification in Forex Operations from IIBF (PDF)
Biodata Form (duly filled, signed & scanned - available on Bank’s career website under the advertisement) (PDF)
Form-16 / Offer Letter / Latest Salary Slip from current employer (PDF)
No Objection Certificate (NOC) from present employer (mandatory if working in Government Institute/Public Sector Unit/Public Sector Bank) (PDF)
Mandatory Undertaking (format available on Bank’s career page against Adv. No. CRPD/SCO/2026-27/05) (PDF)
important_instructions: Candidates must apply online only; hard copy of application and other documents need not be sent to SBI’s office. The position of Trade Finance Officer (MMGS-II) shall remain in Specialist cadre and will have no provision for conversion into General cadre. Teaching and training experience will not be counted for eligibility. Candidates with any disciplinary proceedings pending or contemplated against them as on date will not be eligible to apply; an undertaking must be uploaded at the time of online application. CIBIL: Candidates who have defaulted in repayment under any lending arrangement with Banks/NBFCs/Financial Institutions including credit card dues and have not regularized/repaid their outstanding till the date of issuance of offer of recruitment by the Bank shall not be eligible for appointment. Candidates serving in Govt./Quasi Govt. offices/Public Sector undertakings/Nationalized Banks must submit NOC from their employer at the time of interview, failing which their candidature will not be considered. In case of multiple applications for the same post, only the last valid (completed) application will be retained; fee paid for other registrations will stand forfeited. OBC certificate containing the ‘non-creamy layer’ clause, issued during the period 01.04.2026 to the date of interview, must be submitted by OBC candidates if called for interview. EWS candidates not in possession of “Income & Asset Certificate” for FY2025-26 on or before closure of online application date should apply under “UR Category” only. Outstation candidates called for interview will be reimbursed airfare (economy class, shortest route, to-and-fro) up to a maximum of Rs. 10,000/- on submission of original flight tickets/invoice and boarding pass. All changes/updates/revisions/corrigendum/results will be hosted on the Bank’s website only; no separate intimation will be issued. Any legal proceedings arising out of this advertisement can be instituted only in Mumbai; Courts/Tribunals/Forums at Mumbai only shall have sole and exclusive jurisdiction. Candidates are advised to keep their email ID/mobile number active till the declaration of result and issuance of call letters on final selection. SBI does not endorse, authorize or associate with any external coaching platform, consultancy, individual or digital channel claiming to provide guaranteed selection or insider guidance. Candidates must rely solely on information available on SBI’s official career portal.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026 is 02 June 2026. Candidates should complete the registration process before the deadline to avoid technical issues. Applications submitted after the last date will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are announced in SBI SCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: State Bank of India has announced a total of 100 vacancies for the post of Trade Finance Officer in MMGS-II Grade. This recruitment is conducted under the Specialist Cadre Officers category. Eligible banking and finance candidates can apply online through the SBI official website.

faq.question: Q3. What is the qualification required for SBI Trade Finance Officer posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must fulfill the educational qualification and experience requirements mentioned in the official SBI notification. Applicants are advised to read the detailed advertisement carefully before applying. Only eligible candidates will be considered for the recruitment process.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for SBI Specialist Cadre Officers Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for SBI SCO Recruitment 2026 is completely online. Candidates need to visit the SBI Careers portal, fill out the application form, upload documents, and pay the fee online. No offline applications will be accepted by the bank.

faq.question: Q5. What is the job grade offered in SBI Trade Finance Officer Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selected candidates will be appointed in MMGS-II Grade under the Specialist Cadre Officers category. This is a reputed officer-level banking position in State Bank of India. The recruitment offers a strong career opportunity in the banking sector.

faq.question: Q6. Where can candidates apply for SBI SCO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply through the official website of State Bank of India. The online application link has been activated from 13 May 2026. Applicants should keep their email ID, mobile number, and documents ready before registration.
